# checkpointsase_standard_networks (Data Source)

List all standard networks in Check Point SASE. Uses the /v2.3/networks/standard endpoint.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `networks` (List of Object) The list of standard networks. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--networks))

<a id="nestedatt--networks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `networks`

Read-Only:

- `accesstype` (String)
- `createdat` (String)
- `dns` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `isdefault` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `subnet` (String)
- `tags` (List of String)
- `tenantid` (String)
- `updatedat` (String)
